body.focus:
for i in range(len(s)):
        len1 = expand_around_center(i, i)
        len2 = expand_around_center(i, i + 1)
        curr_len = max(len1, len2)
        
        if curr_len > max_len:
            max_len = curr_len
            start = i - (curr_len - 1) // 2
